word: H5640 - סָתַם - çâtham - saw-tham' - Closed up

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂתם סתם

Transliteration: sâtham śâtham

Phonetic: saw-tham'

BDB Definition:

  1. to stop up, shut up, keep close
    1. (Qal)
      1. to stop up
      2. to shut up, keep close
      3. secret (participle)
    2. (Niphal) to be stopped up
    3. (Piel) to stop up

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1550

Part(s) of speech: Verb
